section.title: Our Work
section.subtitle: A selection of projects showcasing our expertise across different domains.

p1.title: Enterprise DWH for Banking
p1.desc: Designed and deployed a high-performance data warehouse for one of Azerbaijan's leading banks, processing millions of transactions daily.

p2.title: Oracle to PostgreSQL Migration
p2.desc: Successfully migrated critical banking systems from Oracle to PostgreSQL with zero downtime, reducing licensing costs by 70%.

p3.title: IOMETE Lakehouse Deployment
p3.desc: Deployed a full data lakehouse platform using IOMETE for a government agency, enabling unified analytics across multiple data sources.

p4.title: Real-time BI Dashboard
p4.desc: Built comprehensive Power BI and Tableau dashboards for an energy company, providing real-time operational insights.

p5.title: NoSQL Cluster Optimization
p5.desc: Redesigned and optimized a MongoDB cluster for a telecom company, improving query performance by 5x.

p6.title: ETL Pipeline Modernization
p6.desc: Modernized legacy ETL processes using Apache Spark and IOMETE, reducing data processing time from hours to minutes.
